title: draba siliquosa subsp. carinthiaca
intro: Draba siliquosa subsp. carinthiaca is a subspecies of the Draba siliquosa plant, a small, annual or biennial cruciferous plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Draba siliquosa subsp. carinthiaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
